hooks.command: bash -c 'dir="$PWD"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ]; do [ -f "$dir/.workflow-root" ] && exec bash "$dir/workflow/scripts/session-start.sh"; dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; echo ".workflow-root not found" >&2; exit 1'

bash -c 'dir="$PWD"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ]; do [ -f "$dir/.workflow-root" ] && exec bash "$dir/workflow/scripts/session-export.sh"; dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; echo ".workflow-root not found" >&2; exit 1'
